name: Intent Tagger
description: Classify each scraped page by its intent (About, Products, Press, Partners, Careers, Contact, etc.) so downstream steps can prioritize and route content.
usage_notes: Runs heuristic classification by default (no API calls). Enable use_llm for pages where heuristics are ambiguous. Set priority_intents to control which page types appear first in the output.

options.name: use_llm
options.label: Enable LLM fallback
options.description: When heuristic confidence is below the threshold, use an LLM to classify the page intent. Costs tokens but catches ambiguous pages.

options.name: llm_threshold
options.label: LLM confidence threshold
options.description: Pages with heuristic confidence below this value will be sent to the LLM for classification (if LLM fallback is enabled).

options.name: ai_model
options.label: AI model
options.description: Which model to use for LLM classification fallback.

options.name: ai_provider
options.label: AI provider
options.description: Which provider to use for LLM classification fallback.

options.name: priority_intents
options.label: Priority intents (comma-separated)
options.description: Intents to sort first in the output. Pages matching these intents appear at the top of results for each entity.
